task.title: Prototype docs-as-tests for API docs in an experimental profile.

context.problem_statement: Some documentation claims can be validated as behavior, but docs-freshness currently checks local links, documented commands, script/schema references, and optional semantic receipts. Add an opt-in experimental docs-as-tests profile for API documentation that runs only high-confidence, explicitly declared checks.
background: AGW-019 added docs-propose sidecar artifacts for missing docs coverage.
AGW-030 is scoped to a prototype experimental profile with high-confidence checks only.
Existing docs-freshness already checks links, documented Make/script/schema references, and optional semantic receipts.
The installer already supports composable profiles under templates/profiles/ and rejects unknown profiles.
The source docs/codex-review-trace.md concept from AGW-029 is published in agent-workflow-kit; AGW-030 should not edit source prompt truth.
non_goals: Do not scrape arbitrary Markdown prose and guess whether claims are testable.
Do not execute arbitrary fenced code blocks from documentation.
Do not include the experimental profile in the default, minimal, or agentic presets.
Do not require network access, running services, browser automation, hosted models, or GitHub API calls.
Do not attempt a full OpenAPI/YAML validator or generated-client test harness in this slice.
Do not weaken existing docs-impact, docs-freshness, semantic receipt, or docs-propose behavior.
Do not edit agent-workflow-kit prompt source except source backlog closeout after kit validation.

report_sources: git ls-remote origin refs/heads/main for source and kit remotes
kit make agent-task-status attempted and unavailable in the kit checkout
previous_task_state.notes: AGW-030 packet creation began after AGW-029 was pushed and closed in source, source and kit remotes matched local HEADs, both worktrees were clean, source task-status reported zero active tasks, and source agent-next selected AGW-030. The kit source checkout itself does not expose an installed agent-task-status target; this is recorded as unavailable surface, not active task state.

closeout_required_before_start.reason: The previous AGW-029 task has source implementation and closeout commits, matching remote refs, clean worktrees, and no active source task metadata.
closeout_required_before_start.required_next_step: Proceed with exactly one AGW-030 worker in repo-contract-kit; refresh source and kit status if either repo becomes dirty before worker launch.

goal_alignment.repo_goal: Keep repo-contract-kit as the install-layer guardrail provider for target repos, with opt-in local checks that improve documentation truth while preserving no-network, no-mutation defaults.

area_contracts.purpose: Existing local docs freshness gate for links, commands, scripts, schemas, and semantic receipt presence.
Stable wrapper CLI for local read-only helper commands and JSON/text output.
Installed Make target surface for target-repo docs and agent commands.
Composable optional install profiles and profile-owned docs/config files.
Installed target-repo operator guidance for docs checks and agent workflows.

stop_conditions: Stop if the implementation would execute arbitrary Markdown code blocks or undocumented shell snippets.
Stop if the experimental profile would be installed by default or added to the agentic preset without a separate decision.
Stop if checks require network, running services, browser automation, hosted models, or external accounts.
Stop if the checker treats heuristic prose parsing as pass/fail evidence.
Stop if docs-as-tests behavior weakens existing docs-freshness, docs-impact, docs-propose, or semantic receipt gates.
Stop if the task expands into full OpenAPI/YAML validation, generated-client testing, or CI adapter wiring.

protected_files: Do not edit agent-workflow-kit canonical prompts, schemas, or adapters for this kit-owned task.
Do not add docs-as-tests to the minimal, default, or agentic preset.
Do not mutate target-owned VERSION or CHANGELOG.md in installed target repos.
Do not add network, browser, hosted model, or GitHub API dependencies.
Unrelated backlog rows and unrelated dirty work.
expected_outputs: An opt-in experimental docs-as-tests profile, likely named docs-as-tests, that installs example config and operator guidance without joining default or agentic presets.
A deterministic local checker for explicitly declared high-confidence documentation assertions, with JSON and text output.
At least one API-doc-oriented assertion type, such as checking that documented HTTP method/path claims exist in a local JSON OpenAPI spec supplied by config.
No heuristic prose scraping and no execution of arbitrary fenced snippets.
Safe refusal output for missing config, unsupported assertion kinds, ambiguous selectors, missing local spec files, invalid JSON, network URLs, or command-like unsafe inputs.
Installed Make target and wrapper CLI exposure if the checker is implemented as a command.
Docs explaining how the experimental profile relates to docs-freshness, docs-impact, semantic receipts, and future broader docs-as-tests work.
VERSION and CHANGELOG.md record the repo-contract-kit behavior/profile change.
Source backlog rows and summary close AGW-030 only after kit validation passes.

acceptance_criteria.description: An experimental docs-as-tests profile can be installed explicitly and is not included in default/minimal/agentic presets.
acceptance_criteria.verification: Install tests cover --profile docs-as-tests or equivalent and assert preset membership is unchanged.

acceptance_criteria.description: The checker runs only manifest/config-declared high-confidence assertions and refuses heuristic Markdown scraping or arbitrary code execution.
acceptance_criteria.verification: Focused tests cover pass/fail/refusal cases and inspect JSON output.

acceptance_criteria.description: The prototype validates at least one API-doc assertion against a local artifact, preferably method/path presence in a local JSON OpenAPI spec.
acceptance_criteria.verification: Focused tests create sample docs/config/spec and assert passing and failing API operation checks.

acceptance_criteria.description: Output is deterministic and machine-readable, with assertion ids, source doc paths, spec paths, result, failures, omissions/refusals, target_repo_writes false, and network_used false.
acceptance_criteria.verification: Focused JSON tests inspect output shape.

acceptance_criteria.description: Installed Make target and wrapper CLI expose the experimental check without making it part of normal docs-check unless the explicit profile/config asks for it.
Docs make the experimental/high-confidence boundary clear and explain relation to docs-freshness, docs-impact, docs-propose, and semantic receipt review.
The behavior/profile change is versioned and documented in repo-contract-kit.
Source backlog rows and summary close AGW-030 only after kit validation passes.

commands.command: PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 python3 -m unittest tests.test_docs_as_tests tests.test_install tests.test_repo_contract_kit_cli
Install smoke: python3 scripts/install.py <temp-target> --profile docs-as-tests, then run make docs-as-tests or the installed equivalent against sample config.

commands.expected_result: pass in source repo after closeout
pass in source repo after closeout
pass in source repo after closeout

evidence_to_capture: install smoke output for the experimental profile
source backlog and split-backlog validation after closeout

readiness_check.command: make agent-task-ready TASK=AGW-030 TASK_READY_JSON=1 or record why unavailable in the kit source checkout
readiness_check.expected_result: ready report passes, or unavailable surface/blocker is recorded

lifecycle_action.command: make agent-task-finalize TASK=AGW-030 TASK_RECEIPT=<path> TASK_FINALIZE_JSON=1 or lifecycle fallback
lifecycle_action.expected_result: metadata is closed and final receipt is linked, or fallback receipt is durable

final_task_status.command: make agent-task-status TASK_STATUS_INCLUDE_CLOSED=1 TASK_STATUS_JSON=1 in source and, if available, kit
final_task_status.expected_result: no active AGW-030 task metadata after parent closeout, or terminal metadata with linked receipt before cleanup

closeout_preview.command: make agent-task-closeout TASK_CLOSEOUT_JSON=1 or record why unavailable in the kit source checkout
closeout_preview.expected_result: eligible, retained, blocked, or unavailable cleanup state is recorded

closeout_requirements.dirty_state_explanation: Final handoff must state whether source and kit checkouts are clean, only expected files are dirty, cleanup is blocked, or unrelated dirt was preserved.

paths: source backlog summary and feature matrix files
docs_impact.notes: This changes installed profile/CLI/Make/docs behavior in repo-contract-kit.

known_risks: Docs-as-tests can become unsafe if it executes arbitrary examples from documentation.
Heuristic prose parsing could create false confidence or noisy false failures.
Adding the profile to default presets would make experimental checks unexpectedly visible in target repos.
OpenAPI YAML support may invite non-stdlib dependencies or partial parsers; prefer JSON-only or explicit refusal in this prototype.
A checker that writes artifacts by default would violate the docs-check no-mutation expectation.
stop_conditions: The implementation requires network access, a running app server, browser automation, hosted models, or external accounts.
The checker cannot make unsafe snippets/refusals explicit in JSON output.
The profile cannot be installed explicitly without altering default or agentic preset behavior.
The task needs a full API testing framework rather than a bounded high-confidence prototype.
Validation fails in a way that requires unrelated kit refactors.

approval.notes: User approved implementing the workflow-stack plan and backlog follow-ons serially with one task agent per backlog item.

overlap_warnings: The kit source checkout does not expose installed task-status/finalizer targets; parent must record unavailable lifecycle surfaces rather than inventing metadata.
This is repo-contract-kit implementation work; source repo edits are limited to packet commit and later backlog closeout.
Parent handles source task-packet commit, worker launch, kit integration, validation, kit commit/push, and source backlog closeout.
coordination.worker_rule: Use exactly one worker for this backlog item. The worker owns repo-contract-kit implementation files only; the parent owns source task-packet commit, integration, validation, publication, and source backlog closeout.

deterministic_reports: source make agent-task-status TASK_STATUS_INCLUDE_CLOSED=1 TASK_STATUS_JSON=1 passed with zero active tasks and no hazards.
source make agent-next selected AGW-030 and reported dirty false.
source and kit git ls-remote refs matched local HEADs.
kit make agent-task-status is unavailable in the kit source checkout and was recorded as an omission.

token_budget.guidance: Keep docs-as-tests docs and examples compact. Prefer one small explicit config example and focused tests over broad prose.

handoff.owner: one worker agent for repo-contract-kit implementation; parent for packet commit, integration, validation, push, and source backlog closeout
dependencies: repo-contract-kit wrapper CLI and installed Make bridge
handoff.next_packet_hint: After AGW-030 closes, continue with the next open backlog item selected by make agent-next.
